title: craspedia minor
intro: Craspedia minor, also known as the Drumstick Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Craspedia minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications like creams and salves.
